title: Landfall-230: The Great Dominion
description: Modpack for the Landfall SMP, timeline Landfall-230: The Great Dominion.
body:
![This timeline is over! Check our Discord for more information.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07267c1ec70c01823632987b7b24cad731a4e8f5.png)

![Landfall-230: The Great Dominion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d565af6f9840da6e724840935068bc033707ca03.png)

----
In [The Great Dominion](https://www.landfall.world/epochs/landfall-230-the-great-dominion/), the world witnesses the birth of a sprawling power as alliances are forged and factions establish their influence. But beneath the surface of this newfound order, rivalries and silent conflicts simmer, threatening to unravel the fragile unity. As powerful groups like Lilarreich and Crazy Town position themselves for control, the stage is set for a sequence of subtle power plays, each shaping the future in unexpected ways.

----

This modpack uses the following mods not available on Modrinth:
- [WorldBorder (dimensional)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dimensional-worldborder-continuation)
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
